name: Zombie Outbreak 1942
short_description: Glowing eyes are seen in the distance, and you start to hear the sounds of the undead approaching your location. You quickly scramble to find your pistol and barricade the windows as quickly as you can, but it's too late. Zombies are approaching. Can you survive the zombie outbreak?
detailed_description:
Glowing eyes are seen in the distance,  and you start to hear the sounds of the undead approaching your location. You quickly scramble to find your pistol and barricade the windows as quickly as you can,  but unfortunately it's too late.  

A zombie outbreak is the last thing that you're expecting during World War II,  but now it is your new reality.  The only option you have left is to survive for as long as you can. 

Use your pistol and any weapons that you can find in the environment around you to try and hold of the hordes of zombies.  Traverse unknown locations and intense survival maps while annihilating the undead with the ultimate goal of surviving for as long as possible. 

ZOMBIE SURVIVAL MODE

Use classic weapons from World War II to fight zombies in thrilling environments and mysterious locations.  Explore your surroundings to find secrets and survive for as long as possible while earning Steam Achievements and earning a higher position on the Steam Leaderboards.

The zombies are more determined with every passing second,  so you'll need to use your instincts in order to survive the zombie outbreak. 

GAMEPLAY FEATURES

  • Time-Based Zombie Survival Mode

  • Multiple HDRP Zombie Survival Maps & Locations

  • Full Controller Support for PlayStation and Xbox Controllers

  • Steam Leaderboards

  • Steam Achievements
